description: Chapter 2.6.7 - Collections, Smart Playlists & Custom Music Shelves. Transform the collections tab into a premium experience with collection gallery (4-col grid), customizable collection covers (single/2x2/3x3/gradient), collection details page with mixed content (songs/albums/artists), drag-and-drop reordering, smart auto-generated collections, search/filter/sort, collection themes, statistics, recommendations, bulk actions, and import/export architecture.
steps: Create app/components/favorites/collections/ directory for all new components

Create CollectionHero.tsx - Glass Level 5 hero: collection count, total songs/albums/artists, recently updated collection, featured collection, artwork mosaic background from collection covers with color extraction + gradient + glass overlay + ambient glow

Create CollectionCard.tsx - Premium card with: cover artwork (supports single/2x2 grid/3x3 mosaic/gradient styles), collection name, description preview, item count, last updated, estimated duration, favorite badge, quick action overlay on hover (Open, Edit, Delete, Duplicate, Share). Glass Level 3. 180ms hover: lift, reflection sweep, glow border, artwork zoom, shadow
Create CollectionGallery.tsx - 4-col (desktop), 3-col (tablet), 2-col (mobile) responsive grid of CollectionCards

Create CollectionDetails.tsx - Full collection view with: hero artwork, description, statistics (songs/albums/artists/genres/duration), content list supporting mixed types (songs, albums, artists), drag-and-drop reordering with smooth animations, bulk select mode, edit mode for renaming/description

Create CollectionEditor.tsx - Modal/drawer for creating and editing collections: name input, description textarea, cover style selector (single/2x2/3x3/gradient), accent color picker, save/cancel. Glass Level 5 dialog

Create CollectionCoverGenerator.tsx - Generates cover artwork from collection items: single (first item artwork), 2x2 grid (first 4 artworks), 3x3 mosaic (first 9 artworks), gradient (extracted colors from items). All rendered with CSS/Canvas

Create SmartCollections.tsx - Auto-generated read-only collections: Recently Added (last 50), Recently Played (from history), Top Songs (most played), Top Artists, Top Albums, Hidden Gems (low-popularity favorites), New Discoveries. Each smart collection has a distinctive badge/icon
Create CollectionSearch.tsx - Instant search (150ms debounce) across collection name, description, contained songs/albums/artists
Create CollectionFilters.tsx - Multi-select: Recently Updated, Recently Created, Favorites, Largest/Smallest, by Genre
Create CollectionSorting.tsx - Sort by: Recently Updated (default), Recently Created, Alphabetical, Duration, Item Count. Glass-dropdown styling
Create CollectionStatistics.tsx - Animated counters: Total Collections, Songs, Albums, Artists, Genres, Total Duration, Average Collection Size
Create CollectionRecommendations.tsx - Suggest songs/albums/artists to add based on collection content genres and existing items. Show recommendation reason
Create CollectionContextMenu.tsx - Right-click/long-press context menu (Glass Level 4): Open, Edit, Duplicate, Rename, Share, Export (JSON), Delete, Favorite
Create CollectionsSkeleton.tsx - Progressive loading skeleton for hero, gallery, statistics
Create EmptyCollections.tsx - Premium empty state: illustration, 'You haven\'t created any collections', buttons (Create Collection, Generate Smart Collection, Discover Music)
Create CollectionsPage.tsx - Main orchestrating component combining hero, smart collections section, user collections gallery, search/filter/sort controls, empty/loading states
Update app/favorites/page.tsx - Replace the collections tab content with the new CollectionsPage component
Implement drag-and-drop within CollectionDetails using native HTML5 drag events (no external library): dragstart/dragover/dragend with visual feedback (scale, glow, drop indicator)
Implement bulk actions: multi-select mode with checkboxes, bulk move/delete/duplicate/favorite
Implement export as JSON (download .json file with collection data) and import from JSON (file input that parses and creates collection)
Extend lib/collections.ts - Add: duplicateCollection, updateCollectionTheme, reorderCollectionItems, getCollectionStatistics, generateSmartCollections helpers
Ensure full keyboard navigation, ARIA labels (role='list', role='listitem' for draggable items), focus-visible, semantic HTML, touch targets >= 44px
Responsive: desktop 4-col + sidebar, tablet 3-col, mobile 2-col with bottom sheets for editors/menus
acceptance_criteria: Collections tab renders premium hero with artwork mosaic and glass overlay
Collection gallery displays user collections in responsive grid
Smart collections section shows auto-generated collections with distinctive badges
Creating a new collection via editor dialog works correctly
Editing collection name, description, and cover style works
Drag-and-drop reorders items within a collection with visual feedback
Bulk select mode allows multi-item delete/move/duplicate
Filter and sort controls work correctly
Context menu provides all collection actions
Import reads JSON file and creates collection
Empty state renders when no collections exist
bun run lint passes with zero errors
bun run build succeeds with zero errors
verification: Run `bun run lint` and confirm zero errors
Run `bun run build` and confirm successful compilation
findings: Used useSyncExternalStore pattern for Date.now() in SmartCollections to avoid React 19 purity rule violations (impure function in render). Smart collections use a timestamp variable from useSyncExternalStore rather than calling Date.now() directly in useMemo. The old CollectionsManager component file remains in the codebase but is no longer imported anywhere. All 16 collection components created in app/components/favorites/collections/ directory. Build and lint pass cleanly.
